ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of company registration */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of operation */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of operation */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of operation */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the company's location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidiaries" (
  "subsidiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsidiary */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that owns the subsidiary */,
  "cin_gln" TEXT /* CIN/GLN of the subsidiary */,
  "holding_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of holding */,
  "percentage_held" REAL /* Percentage of shares held by the company */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Applicable section of the regulatory framework */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of subsidiary registration */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the subsidiary's CEO */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "website" TEXT /* Subsidiary's website URL */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the subsidiary */,
  "board_of_directors" TEXT /* List of board members */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next audit */,
  "financial_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  "legal_representative" TEXT /* Name of the legal representative */,
  "tax_identification_number" TEXT /* Tax identification number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsidiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidiaries_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidiaries_holding_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_type_id") REFERENCES holding_types ("holding_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidiaries_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holding_types" (
  "holding_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding type */,
  "holding_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the holding type (e.g., subsidiary, joint venture, associate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holding type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., 2 (87)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholdings" (
  "shareholding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholding */,
  "subsidiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsidiary */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that owns the subsidiary */,
  "percentage_held" REAL /* Percentage of shares held by the company */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of change in ownership */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, sale) */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in ownership */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the approving authority */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shareholding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholdings_subsidiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsidiary_id") REFERENCES subsidiaries ("subsidiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  "position" TEXT /* User's position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Zip code of the company's location
ID of the company that owns the subsidiary
Percentage of shares held by the company
Applicable section of the regulatory framework
End date of the financial year
Unique identifier for each holding type
Name of the holding type (e.g., subsidiary, joint venture, associate)
ID of the company that owns the subsidiary
Percentage of shares held by the company
Reason for the change in ownership
Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff)
Date when the user account was created
Date when the user account was last updated
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the user accessing the system
Date when the system was accessed
IP address from which the access occurred
User agent string of the device used
Duration of the access in seconds
